treatment_timeline.event: Admission for evaluation of dizziness, double vision, nausea, and unsteadiness
MRI scan revealed a left cerebellar ischemic infarct
Started on aspirin to reduce the risk of future strokes

patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Follow up with primary care provider within one week, neurology, and cardiology
patient_outcome.long_term_prognosis: Higher risk of forming blood clots, to be confirmed with repeat blood test
patient_outcome.quality_of_life: Patient's mental status was clear and coherent
